meaning: n.夹子,夹具,夹钳vt.夹住,夹紧
examples: The wood is held in position by a clamp.
Somebody forgot to bring along the U-bolts to clamp the microphones to the pole.
Blades without clips are held by screws and the clamp on the handle.
His Freedom Party has pledged to end foreign influence in Austria and clamp down on immigration.
Prime Minister Julia Gillard has pledged to clamp down on the "457" temporary work visas.
